K5.name: 文档产出

phase_name: Phase K — 完整真实模型对比报告
notes: 11/12 tasks complete. All 5 suites executed (695 eval runs, ~$2.79 total). Only K2-T3 (SWE-bench, optional) remains. Known bugs: loop_guard.rs UTF-8 boundary panic, DeepSeek context suite network errors.
